---
name: create-instructions
description: Describe when to use this prompt
agent: Instructions Generator Agent
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

Take the information below and generate and agent instructions file in markdown format for the /docs directory. If a .md filename is provided, use it. If not, generate a concise filename based on the content. The instructions should be clear and specific not too long.
Make sure to update the AGENTS.md file with to reference this new docs file.
If no information is provided, below, prompt the user to give to the necessary
details about the layer of architecture or coding standards to document.
